Türkçe

Within the scope of the “Special Call for the 100th Anniversary of Our Republic”, 4 out of 8 projects submitted by our university were eligible for support.

We congratulate our professors whose projects were supported, Prof. Dr. Volkan Ediger, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Zeynep Günsür Yüceil, Assist. Prof. Özen Baş and Assist. Prof. Özlem Hemiş.

We would also like to thank them for the pride they have given us in the 100th anniversary of the Republic.

While the support rate for the call was 20.3% across Türkiye, this rate was 50% at our university.

We wish success to all project teams and thank our referee instructors who served on our internal panels for their contributions.

Supported project information is provided in the table below.

Project Manager

Department

Project Title

Project Team

Prof. Dr. Volkan Ediger

Industrial Engineering

Energy strategies in the second century of the Republic: Assessment of historical dynamics and future vision in light of global trends

Assoc. Prof.. Dr. Mustafa Hekimoğlu, Prof. Dr. Erinç Yeldan, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Emrah Karaoğuz, Prof. Dr. Hasan Dağ

Assoc. Prof.. Dr. Zeynep Gunsur Yuceil

Theatre

As an example from the field of Theatre Anthropology, the research of the Theatre Research Laboratory (TAL): A bridge between the traditions and rituals of Anatolia and contemporary performing arts

Dr. Lecturer Member Özlem Hemiş, Dr. Lecturer Ayşe Draz, Serap Özyurt

Prof. Dr. Füsun Alioğlu, Prof. Dr. Bülent Diken, Assist. Prof. İrem İnceoğlu, Assist. Prof. Özlem Hemiş

New Media

Rethinking Active Citizenship in the 100th Anniversary of Our Republic: Political Participation and Citizen Interaction in Social Media

Prof. Dr. Burak Ozcetin, Respected Vedat Alkurt

Dr. Lecturer Member İrem İnceoğlu, Assistant Professor Gözde Cöbek, Assistant Professor İdil Akın

Theatre

A Social Reconciliation Between Festival and Ceremony: Local, Current and Contemporary Functions of the Specific Patterns of Traditional Village Plays in the Republic Day Celebrations of Pınarcık Village, Milas District, Muğla Province

Assoc. Prof.. Dr. Zeynep Günsür Yüceil, Assist. Prof. İrem İnceoğlu, Prof. Dr. Hasan Dağ, Assist. Prof. Nilgün Firidinoğlu Tiryaki, Prof. Dr. Arzu Öztürkmen

Prof. Dr. Banu Manav, Assist. Prof. Defne Karaosmanoğlu, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Ayşe Nur Erek
